hero.subtitle: Independent Linux Distribution
about.title: About
about.p1: NurOS is an independent Linux distribution designed for high speed, security, and accessibility. Our goal is to create an open and powerful operating system for developers and everyday users.

download.title: Download NurOS
download.subtitle: All releases are rolling. Pick your edition and architecture.
download.note: Note: rootfs must be mounted manually
download.juldyz.label: Desktop
download.juldyz.desc: The main desktop edition. Stable, clean, and ready for daily use.
download.josh.label: Enthusiast
download.josh.desc: Custom builds for enthusiast and embedded projects. Tailored configurations, same rolling core.
